snort_rules.rule_text: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CISA, Microsoft warn of active exploitation of Windows Shell"; content:"CVE-2026-32202"; nocase; sid:5214789; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)
